scripts.build:apps: pnpm --filter @sm/web build && pnpm --filter @sm/api build && pnpm --filter @sm/worker build && (cd apps/agent && if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then go build ./...; elif [ "${SM_REQUIRE_GO:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo "Go is required to build apps/agent" && exit 1; else echo "Skipping apps/agent build: Go toolchain not installed"; fi)
scripts.test:apps: pnpm --filter @sm/web test && pnpm --filter @sm/api test && pnpm --filter @sm/worker test && (cd apps/agent && if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then go test ./...; elif [ "${SM_REQUIRE_GO:-0}" = "1" ]; then echo "Go is required to test apps/agent" && exit 1; else echo "Skipping apps/agent tests: Go toolchain not installed"; fi)
